name: LibreSpeed
compose:
name: slashnode-librespeed
services:
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/librespeed/speedtest:6.1.0
    container_name: librespeed
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3011:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-librespeed_server_data-config
